product_baseline_chain: 文档库 -> 知识库 -> 索引层 -> RAG -> 编排层 -> 文档/Skill/Agent/A2A
scope: Maps registered capability evidence to product-facing Provider statuses. This does not load external projects, bundle external runtimes, or add top-level pages.

stage3_classification_model.template_asset: Manifest-backed Skill/Agent/document template asset without runtime load.
stage3_classification_model.architecture_reference: Reference that must be absorbed, rejected, or deferred with a blocker.

future_reference_resolutions.rejection_reason: Plugin marketplace compatibility is not an authorized product surface and is covered by the existing Provider loading rule boundary.
Developer code graph tooling does not improve the ordinary v3 document-to-KB-to-Agent user chain beyond existing audit/governance boundaries.
Long-video model engineering requires GPU/vendor runtime scope that conflicts with the current Provider boundary and offers no near-term v3 main-chain gain.

future_reference_resolutions.blocker: Requires Agent runtime contract, permission allow/deny evidence, memory/tool sandbox proof, and rollback audit before absorption.
Requires an Exporter Provider contract, local PPTX export proof, health/readiness evidence, and rollback audit before absorption.

future_reference_resolutions.rejection_reason: Interactive code/navigation visualization is outside the ordinary knowledge workbench main chain and overlaps existing UI architecture work.

capabilities.boundary: User-facing capability status only. Registered project names and external runtimes are not exposed as normal product modules.
